postmortem.summary: LiveFlow rebound card finished 1-1. Wembanyama cleared comfortably and validated the big-board environment. Nance missed by one rebound in a diluted Bucks rebound distribution during a blowout loss.

reasoning: 31 minutes was sufficient to crush the number
Hook miss at 5 rebounds on a 5.5 line
Minutes were sufficient but rebound share was diluted
Turner, Dieng, and Sims absorbed too much of the available board volume
Blowout distribution widened secondary rebound outcomes

postmortem.model_takeaway: Secondary rebound overs on weak underdogs should be downgraded when rebound share is not tightly consolidated. Primary rebound anchors remain strongest in big-board environments, even in blowouts.
postmortem.suggested_new_rule: Apply a secondary rebound dilution penalty when underdog frontcourt rebound share projects across three or more players with credible board access.
